# About
These are copy/paste strings of various BPs in [Captain of Industry](https://www.captain-of-industry.com/) [[Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1594320/Captain_of_Industry/)].  
If no credit given, they are my BPs.  Otherwise, credits and source URLs are given.  
If I find a source or URL go dark, I'll still maintain the source, I'll unlink and indicate it's gone dark or no longer available
The internet never forgets, right? {satire look}

# My BPs
## Filler Plantation
Filler Plantation -- Collect, at the lowest priority, the items being used as ground filler, and then drop to a spot on the land for Excavators to pick up and then feed to trucks to lay out the land.

Note: Update 4 includes a Stacker Tower.  You could feed these materials to the tower instead of dropping to the ground.
```
B1084:
```

## Modular Refinery
This blueprint gets the ball rolling with the second level of Refineries to produce the Diesel, oils and sour water.

The Primary Refinery blueprint contains a "booster" boiler that takes in woodchips or biomass.  This refinery can be changed to support coal, but that's intentionally not included in the recipe list.  The Boostrap Boiler is Initially set to Paused. 

Modules included:
- Both tiers of Refineries
- Gas Boiler

```
F4188:```
